focus_points.label: Principal-level impact and leverage on this team.
focus_points.reason: Whether they can point to the Principal-sized outcomes they’re driving right now, not just steady delivery—could be that the work is happening but the impact isn’t yet visible or communicated.

focus_points.label: What Principal scope means in this team.
focus_points.reason: Whether they’ve internalized the current team’s expectations for Principal scope, or if they’re still operating on old assumptions from the prior team—worth clarifying explicitly so feedback can land precisely.

focus_points.label: Cross-team trust and hard-call judgment.
focus_points.reason: Whether their cross-team relationships are building in both directions and whether they’re making the tradeoff calls early enough, or staying in safe execution mode and waiting for others.

focus_points.label: Early expectation alignment in how they engage.
focus_points.reason: What they’re doing in this meeting cycle to align expectations early—Principal work often fails quietly when context and assumptions aren’t surfaced early enough for stakeholders to steer.
